declaration_semantics.statement: This inventory declares known bypass paths with their governance classification. It does not assert that these paths are currently active or currently monitored. A declared bypass path is acknowledged to exist; its declared_containment_class reflects the governance classification assigned by source documents.

bypass_source_structure.semantics: bypass_source entries reference structured evidence. They must never contain raw credential or secret values.

bypass_path_invariant: Declaring a bypass path does not authorize its use. Detecting bypass path use forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch.

bypass_paths.name: Cloudflare Git Integration automatic deploy on push
declared_preconditions: Cloudflare Git Integration enabled at account level
bypass_paths.declared_observability: Cloudflare dashboard deploy log only — no MindShift proof registry binding
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Cloudflare Git Integration disabled at Cloudflare account level — account administrator action required
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Deploy via this path forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch

bypass_paths.name: Direct wrangler deploy via CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN outside governed workflow
bypass_paths.declared_observability: Cloudflare dashboard deploy log — no MindShift proof registry binding unless governed workflow ran
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Token scoped to GitHub Actions OIDC only — no static credential capable of production deploy
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Deploy via this path outside governed workflow forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL

bypass_paths.name: Local governed-deploy.ts with production token and governed context
declared_preconditions: Credential with Workers:Write scope available locally
Valid canonical chain artifact (requires live /session through /proof endpoints)
bypass_paths.declared_observability: deploy_audit_registry.json — governed-deploy.ts emits entry for all invocations including rejections
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Resolved by RBP-002 closure — no local static token means no local production deploy
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Residual local root authority path forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT if executed outside governed workflow; full containment requires OIDC-only token binding

bypass_paths.name: GitHub admin workflow modification and admin-merged bypass
declared_preconditions: Ability to bypass branch protection or merge without PREO
bypass_paths.declared_observability: GitHub audit log — admin bypass events observable; constitutional-integrity.yml detects workflow changes as sovereignty drift
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Branch protection enforcement with no admin override path; admin bypass policy disabled
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Admin bypass of merge governance forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected merge epoch

bypass_paths.name: GitHub repository secrets mutation — MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL or credential redirect
declared_preconditions: GitHub repository admin or environments admin access
Ability to mutate MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL, MINDSHIFT_API_KEY, or CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secrets
bypass_paths.declared_observability: GitHub audit log only — no internal MindShift visibility into secret mutation events
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Secret write authority restricted to designated administrators; secret rotation and integrity policy enforced
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Secret mutation outside governed change management forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT for all deploy epochs using the mutated secret

bypass_paths.name: Branch protection bypass merge
declared_preconditions: Repository admin with branch protection override capability
Ability to merge without required PREO reviews or status checks
bypass_paths.declared_observability: GitHub audit log and pull request event log; merge-governance-check.yml detects unprotected merges
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Branch protection rules enforced with no admin override; all merges require PREO and passing status checks
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Branch protection bypass forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected merge epoch

bypass_paths.name: Canonical serialization code mutation outside governed change
declared_preconditions: Commit access to governance or canonical serialization code paths
Merge without PREO or CODEOWNERS review
bypass_paths.declared_observability: Git commit history — CODEOWNERS review requirement; constitutional-integrity.yml
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: CODEOWNERS enforcement on all governance and serialization paths; required PREO review for any governance mutation
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Serialization code mutation outside governed pipeline forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL for subsequent epochs

bypass_paths.name: Federation evidence treated as legitimacy authority
declared_preconditions: Federation evidence available from external source
Attempt to use federation evidence to override local legitimacy determination
bypass_paths.declared_observability: Governance documents — declared EVIDENCE_ONLY boundary in FEDERATED_RECONCILIATION_SPEC.json
bypass_paths.declared_closure_condition: Federation evidence permanently classified EVIDENCE_ONLY; no execution path treats federation evidence as authoritative
bypass_paths.declared_legitimacy_effect: Treating federation evidence as authoritative forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT and LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch

declared_closure_requirements: RBP-001: Disable Cloudflare Git Integration at account level — CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED, pending account action
RBP-002: Scope credential to GitHub Actions OIDC only — resolves RBP-003 as a consequence
RBP-003: Resolved by RBP-002 closure — no local static credential means no local production deploy
RBP-004: Branch protection with no admin override; monitor via constitutional-integrity.yml
RBP-005: Restrict secret write access; enforce rotation and integrity policy
RBP-006: Enforce required PREO and status checks with no bypass path on main branch
RBP-007: Enforce CODEOWNERS and required PREO for all governance mutations
RBP-008: Permanent EVIDENCE_ONLY classification; no authorizing use path
